license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.79ihr4e
title: Sanger sequencing
author: Igem Dusseldorf

steps_raw.instruction: Label 1.5 mL tubes with barcodes from GATC Biotech
Add template (400 to 500 ng), 2,5 µl of 10µM primer and water (10 uL total volume)
Place tubes inside a small plastic bag and drop off in GATC Collection Box
